creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
tabthorpe    2010-02-04 02:49:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/squirrelmail-postfixadmin-plugin Makefile distinfo 
                                          pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The Postfixadmin SquirrelMail plugin let users change their virtual alias,
  vacation status/message and password if you are using the great postfixadmin
  tool from http://high5.net/postfixadmin.  This plugin uses the XmlRpc
  feature of Postfix Admin v2.3 and later.
  
  WWW: http://squirrelmail-postfixadmin.palepurple.co.uk/
  
  PR:             ports/143453
  Submitted by:   Darren Pilgrim <ports.maintainer at evilphi.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1007    +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/mail/squirrelmail-postfixadmin-plugin/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/squirrelmail-postfixadmin-plugin/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/mail/squirrelmail-postfixadmin-plugin/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +45 -0     ports/mail/squirrelmail-postfixadmin-plugin/pkg-plist (new)
